SECTION A 
IT'S APPEARANCE AND/OR ITS WAYS

Chapter 1 
Synchronise With All Times
A time to be born, and a time to die;

A time to plant, 
and a time to pluck up that which is planted;
A time to kill, and a time to heal;
A time to break down, and a time to build up;
A time to weep, and a time to laugh;
A time to mourn, and a time to dance;

A time to cast away stones, 
and a time to gather stones together;

a time to embrace, 
and a time to refrain from embracing;

A time to seek (H1245 "baqash"), 
and a time to lose/perish (H6 "abad");

A time to keep (H8104 "shamar" beware, take heed), 
and a time to cast away (H7993 "shalak" throw)
A time to rend, and a time to sew;
A time to keep silence, and a time to speak;
A time to love, and a time to hate;
A time of war (H4421 "milchamah"), and a time of peace.
